targets.main_update_bypass_reason: DIP has recorded governed release exceptions: GitHub reported admin bypass for v0.2, and v2.0 temporarily relaxed review count to merge PR #9 before immediately restoring one required review and CODEOWNER review
targets.main_update_bypass_governance_evidence: v0.7 repository governance policy defines time-boxed break-glass requirements; v2.0 branch protection was restored with admin enforcement, required validate check, one required review, CODEOWNER review, force-push blocking, deletion blocking, and conversation resolution
